items.name_en: 【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill slots.
items.name_cn:
【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill slots.
Model: 428726.
Open dimensions: 21(W) x 9cm(H)
Closed dimensions: 11(W) x 9cm(H)
Color: Olive green.

items.name_en: M12598 Monogram! Victor Wallet. This elegant Victor wallet is made of Monogram Eclipse canvas, perfect for coins, business cards, bills, and receipts. It features a snap closure with a bill pocket, five card slots for credit cards or transit cards, and a zippered coin pocket. The Victor wallet is compact and easily fits into a pocket.

items.name_en: M12635 New Embossed! Victor Wallet. This compact Victor wallet is made from Monogram Shadow calfskin, embellished with delicate Monogram embossing patterns, exuding an air of 'understated luxury.' The interior offers practical organization with a zip pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flap features a snap closure and is embellished with the Louis Vuitton signature.

items.name_en: M83689 Rabbit🐰! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced items with vibrant brushstrokes. The Zippy Large Wallet has a capacity comparable to a small bag. It features a smartphone pocket and can hold keys, a passport, credit cards, and cash. Easily stores personal essentials, the perfect travel companion. Dimensions 19Cmx10cm.

items.name_en: M62295 Grey Monogram Eclipse! Chip Edition, ZIPPY Zip Vertical Wallet This Louis Vuitton Zippy vertical zip wallet, crafted from Monogram Eclipse canvas, is stylish and practical, an ideal choice for storing and carrying credit cards and cash. Secure wrap-around zip construction with multiple credit card slots, a zip coin pocket, and several bill and ticket compartments. 10.0 x 20.0 x 2.0 cm (L x H x W).
